titleStmt.title: SII 41.251: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 251. (A.R. No. 469 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the north wall of the first prakārā of the Naṭarājaśvamin shrine in the Vaṭāranēśvara temple at Tiruvālaṅgāḍu.

summary.p: Gift of 250 current pudukkāsu by Paḻaiyanūr-uḍaiyān Vēdavanamuḍaiyān Karuṇākaran alias Amarakōn, for two lamps to the shrine of the goddess Periyanāchchiyār of Tirukkāmakkōṭṭam shrine in the Tiruvālangāḍu temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīirājātirāja tevarkku yāṇṭu 10 Āvatu jeyaṅko
ṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu meṉmalaip paḻaiyaṉūr nāṭṭu paḻaiyaṉūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkāṭu
ṭaiyār koyilil tirukkāmakkoṭṭattu periyanācciyāṟku Immaṇṭalattu Innāyaṉār teva
tāṉam paḻaiyanū(r)ruṭaiyāṉ vetavaṉamuṭaiyāṉ karuṇākaraṉāṉa Amarakoneṉ Ipperiya
nācciyārkku nān vaitta tirununtāviḷakku 2 Iviḷakku Iraṇṭum Ikkoyilil civappirāma
ṇar kāśya(ya)paṉ tirucciṟṟampala paṭṭaṉum kauśikaṉ tiruvālaṅkāṭapaṭṭaṉum Āttiraiyaṉ
cantiracekarapaṭṭaṉum kāśya(ya)paṉ pūtipaṭṭaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa civappirāmaṇar Aṉaivomum poṉ koṇ
ṭu poliūṭṭāka tāṅkaḷ kaiykkoṇṭa Aṉṟāṭu naṟputukkācu Irunūṟṟu Aiympatum Ippu
tukkācu Irunūṟṟu Aiympatum kaiykkoṇṭu nāḷ Oṉṟukku tiruvālaṅkāṭanāle U
ri Eṇṇai Aḷantu Ittirununtāviḷakku Iraṇṭum cantirātittavarai Erikkak kaṭavomāka nāṅ
kaḷ Ipputukkācu Irunūṟṟu Ai(y)mpatum kaiykkoṇṭom Ivvaṉaivom Ippaṭikku
Ivai kāśya(ya)paṉ tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭaṉ ṉeḻuttu kauśyakaṉ tiruvālaṅkāṭapaṭṭaṉ neḻu
ttu kāśya(ya)paṉ caṅkara pāla paṭṭaṉṉeḻuttu Āttiraiyaṉ cantiracēkarapaṭṭaṉ neḻuttu kā
śya(ya)paṉ pūtipaṭṭaṉ neḻuttu kāśya(ya)paṉ vaṉanāyaka paṭṭaṉṉeḻuttu gautamaṉ dekṣi
ṇāmūtti paṭṭaṉ ṉeḻuttu kāśya(ya)paṉ nallāṟ bhaṭṭaṉ ṉeḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 41.251 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
